kospellcheck.command.addWordToProjectDic: KoSpellCheck: Add word to project dictionary
kospellcheck.config.debugLogging.descrip: Enable verbose KoSpellCheck debug logs in Output panel.
kospellcheck.config.localTypoAcceleratio: Automatically downloads the platform-specific Coral runtime package from the KoSpellCheck GitHub repo (`Coral-tpu/<Platform>`) when missing. Manual download: [Start download now](command:kospellcheck.downloadLocalTypoRuntime).
Informational field: list of available models from the installed runtime (updated automatically).
Manual download trigger from Settings. Set to `true` to start runtime download; KoSpellCheck will automatically reset it to `false`.

Optional local typo acceleration mode. `auto`: use only when a compatible local runtime + accelerator is available. `on`: always attempt, with automatic fallback if unavailable. `off`: completely disable this path. Selected model: `kospellcheck.localTypoAcceleration.model`. Manual check: [Open status](command:kospellcheck.checkLocalTypoAccelerationStatus). Choose from list: [Select model](command:kospellcheck.pickLocalTypoModel).
Identifier of the runtime model to use. With `auto`, the runtime manifest default model is used. Dynamic list: [Select model](command:kospellcheck.pickLocalTypoModel).
Informational status field automatically updated by KoSpellCheck. Shows progress of local runtime/model download.
Show a one-time prompt when a compatible local accelerator is detected in auto mode.
Enable verbose logging for local typo accelerator detection and decisions.
kospellcheck.config.projectConventions.a: Threshold for adding local AI anomaly support diagnostics.
Enable optional local AI naming anomaly scoring.
Analyze naming conventions for newly created files.
Analyze naming conventions when files are renamed.
Analyze naming conventions when a file is saved.
Relative path for lightweight local anomaly model weights.
Automatically rebuild the convention profile when project files change.
kospellcheck.config.projectConventions.c: Optional absolute path to KoSpellCheck.ProjectConventions.Cli (.dll, .csproj, or containing folder). If empty, KoSpellCheck auto-resolves packaged CLI or source project.
kospellcheck.config.projectConventions.e: Enable project convention mapping and profile generation.
Glob exclude patterns for project convention scanning.
kospellcheck.config.projectConventions.i: Ignore generated code files when learning and validating conventions.
Relative path for persisted rule suppressions.
Ignore files under test/spec folders when learning and validating conventions.
Optional glob include patterns for project convention scanning.
kospellcheck.config.projectConventions.m: Maximum number of files used when building convention profiles.
Minimum sample size required before deterministic rules become active.
kospellcheck.config.projectConventions.n: Enable deterministic naming convention diagnostics based on learned project conventions.
kospellcheck.config.projectConventions.p: Relative path for cache metadata used to skip unnecessary rebuilds.
Relative path for the learned convention profile JSON.
kospellcheck.config.projectConventions.s: Relative path for project convention scan summary output.
Convention profile scope. workspace = per folder, solution = combined across all workspace folders.
Enable lightweight statistical anomaly scoring to augment deterministic diagnostics.
Threshold for adding statistical anomaly support diagnostics.
File extensions used for convention scanning.
kospellcheck.config.projectConventions.u: If local AI scoring is enabled, try Coral TPU acceleration when available; otherwise fallback to CPU.
kospellcheck.config.uiLanguage.descripti: UI language for KoSpellCheck runtime messages and dashboard. auto = follow VS Code display language.
kospellcheck.configuration.title: KoSpellCheck
kospellcheck.description: Offline HU+EN spell checker extension with code-aware tokenization and quick fix suggestions.
kospellcheck.view.dashboard.name: Dashboard
kospellcheck.viewContainer.title: KoSpellCheck
